label: Latent variables & hidden state

node.label: Latent variables & hidden state
node.definition: Unobserved variables compactly represent hidden causes, state, factors, or abstractions.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Latent variables & hidden state is to connect Probability theory, Statistics & experimental design to downstream capabilities including Unsupervised learning, Predictive representation learning / JEPA, Generative modeling.
examples: substrate for Predictive representation learning / JEPA
limitations: Encoding choices can discard information, amplify bias, or make important invariances difficult to learn. Its direct dependencies include Probability theory, Statistics & experimental design.

dependencies.rationale: Latent variables & hidden state rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Probability theory.
Latent variables & hidden state rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Statistics & experimental design.
Latent variables & hidden state rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Information theory.
